description: The leader of a guild (a player group) reports that a disruptive member is stealing from the shared guild bank.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the guild bank transaction logs.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets a log of all item withdrawals from the guild bank.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the logs to identify the disruptive member and the items they took without permission.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms one member withdrew a large number of valuable items.

nodes.task_description: Issue a temporary ban to the disruptive member and return the stolen items to the guild bank.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent bans the player and restores the stolen items.
